name: sparkline-cell
title: Sparkline Cell
description: A trend glyph beside the value it summarises, sized for a table row. The value is always in text.

props.name: value
props.description: The current value, in text. Always rendered — the glyph is the second encoding.

props.name: align
props.description: Right-align for a numeric table column.

clinicalNotes: A sparkline has no axis, no scale, and no labels: it cannot be the only place a trend is expressed. So the current value is always rendered in text, the glyph is marked `aria-hidden`, and the row remains fully readable to anyone the glyph fails — a screen-reader user, a low-vision reader, a printed chart. Where the trend itself carries the clinical weight, use a real chart with an axis, not this.
notes: Composes trend-sparkline. Used in vitals flowsheets, panel rows, and observation-timeline.
